description: From the manufacturer Dinner candles Those who love romance opt for the dinner candles from Spaas. Due to their elegant shape and bright flame, these candles should not be missing on your dinner table. Especially when the atmosphere can be more intimate, these candles are a must. The warm glow of the Spaas dinner candles will definitely bring your guests closer together. Since they are fragrance-free, they do not spoil the aromas of the delicious dishes at the table and the long burning time offers a carefree evening. The high quality of Spaas dinner candles assures you of the right wax mixture and a top quality wick. This ensures that Spaas dinner candles burn with a bright, stable and large flame. Surprise your guests with a fantastic dinner thanks to the warm glow of the Spaas flame. And today, more than ever, we believe in the connecting power of every flame. That is why we dream of a world where everyone can and may feel connected. Because we too are still amazed at what a flame can do. Safety, Sustainability & Quality Safety Spaas has an excellent reputation when it comes to the quality of candles. We believe it is important to offer products that meet the highest quality and safety standards. On all our candles, we put icons indicating how to burn the candle. We often get complaints because people do not respect the safety symbols. So please read carefully the symbols put on the labels/packaging. It might be that you’re sensitive to certain ingredients in perfumes. Our labels clearly indicate which ingredients can trigger allergies, for example. Sustainability At Spaas, we strongly believe that striving for quality, sustainability and corporate social responsibility is an ongoing effort by our entire team. As a proud recipient of the EcoVadis Platinum label, we are among the top 1% of best performing companies worldwide in terms of sustainability within the label. In our sustainability report, we showcase our environmental, social and governance (ESG) achievements and initiatives and our passion for innovation. Furthermore, we also share our goals for the future. Quality Spaas is certified for both ISO 9001 and BRC consumer products. This shows that our quality management system is on point and we strive for continuous improvement of our processes and products. Making high-quality and safe products that meet customer requirements is therefore our top priority. Our products undergo stringent checks in accordance with current international and European standards. For example, each batch is checked for burning time, burning behaviour, residual content ...
